creator: olce@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Tomasz "CeDeROM" CEDRO from comment #19)

If other people are not able to reproduce your problem (I said elsewhere I have a RX 580 like you, and I never had any crashes) and you're not willing to test, you're essentially preaching in the desert and are unlikely to have your problems solved.  Up to you...

The stacks reported by feh are also different than yours.  You may not be experiencing the same problem at all.

(In reply to feh from comment #18)

Please try drm-61-kmod at the very least, before upgrading to -CURRENT: `pkg install drm-61-kmod`.
